do local f=string.char local Q=math.floor local I=string.len local b=table.concat local E=table.insert local B=string.sub local return(function(A,I,b,E,B,h,Z,w,Y,U,p,V,v,g,s,O,u,o,i,Q)U,Y,w,u,Q,i,g,p,O,s,o,V,v=function(A,f)local I=Y(f)local b=function(b,E,B,h)return Q(A,{b;E;B,h},f,I)end return b end,function(A)for
